name: LGF Bookings
upgrade_notice: Quantity=nights, cost=nightly rate; TVA at line-item level for totals visibility.

sections.description: WordPress-native hotel CRM with calendar, bookings, guests, Invoice Ninja integration, and GitHub-based updating.
sections.changelog:
• 1.9.2.05: Line items show quantity=nights and cost=nightly rate. TVA 10% set at both invoice and line-item level for tax breakdown visibility in totals. Inclusive tax mode.
  • 1.9.2.04: Invoice line items now show quantity = number of nights and cost = nightly rate.
  • 1.9.2.03: Fix: always set product_key on invoice line items so room name and description appear.
  • 1.9.2.02: Version bump.
  • 1.9.2.01: Block invoice creation if IN products are missing (clear error with list of missing keys). Pre-select TVA 10% tax on invoices. Include product notes as line item description.
